rows.label: qev085103_MSG0002
rows.name: Why are you pursuing the duo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085103_MSG0003
rows.name: We have nothing to say to Earthlings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085103_MSG0004
rows.name: It seems you still don't understand your position.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085103_MSG0006
rows.name:
Search targets discovered.
All squads, converge.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085103_MSG0009
rows.name: What should we do with these people?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085103_MSG0010
rows.name: We'll have them go to sleep.[ST:wait ]
